channel.title: wip on Ayush Subedi
channel.description: Recent content in wip on Ayush Subedi

item.title: The Idiot
item.description:
The Idiot by Fyodor Dostoevsky

Character Map

Prince Myshkin

  • Description: A compassionate and naive man
  • Relationships:
    • Falls in love with Nastasya Filippovna
    • Befriends Rogozhin and other characters
  • Role: Protagonist struggling to navigate society’s complexities

Nastasya Filippovna

  • Description: Beautiful and enigmatic woman with a troubled past
  • Relationships:
    • Loved by Prince Myshkin and Rogozhin
    • Linked to other characters through her past and present actions
  • Role: Central figure in the novel’s romantic and psychological conflicts

Rogozhin

  • Description: Wealthy and passionate man, driven by intense emotions
  • Relationships:
    • Competes with Prince Myshkin for Nastasya Filippovna’s affection
    • Tangled relationships with other characters, including his father
  • Role: Antagonist representing the darker aspects of human nature

Aglaya Yepanchin

  • Description: Intelligent and spirited young woman from a noble family
  • Relationships:
    • Attracted to Prince Myshkin despite societal expectations
    • Daughter of General Yepanchin, sister to Ganya and Varya
  • Role: Symbolizes the conflict between societal norms and individual desires

General Yepanchin

  • Description: Prominent figure in Russian society, proud and ambitious
  • Relationships:
    • Father of Aglaya, Ganya, and Varya
    • Associates with various characters from different social circles
  • Role: Represents the values and aspirations of the Russian aristocracy

Ganya

  • Description: Ambitious and opportunistic young man
  • Relationships:
    • Engaged to Varya, but attracted to Nastasya Filippovna for her wealth
    • Son of General Yepanchin, brother to Aglaya and Varya
  • Role: Illustrates the conflict between personal desires and societal expectations

Varya

  • Description: Responsible and devoted young woman
  • Relationships:
    • Engaged to Ganya, but faces uncertainty due to his wavering affections
    • Daughter of General Yepanchin, sister to Aglaya and Ganya
  • Role: Represents traditional values and familial duty in contrast to other characters’ desires

Lebedev

  • Description: Opportunistic and conniving man, often involved in gossip
  • Relationships:
    • Associates with various characters, including Prince Myshkin and General Yepanchin
  • Role: Provides insight into the social dynamics and intrigues of Russian society

Ippolit

  • Description: Intelligent and tormented young man, struggling with illness and existential questions
  • Relationships:
    • Forms a friendship with Prince Myshkin, sharing philosophical discussions
  • Role: Offers commentary on the human condition and the search for meaning in a chaotic world

Keller

  • Description: Wealthy and influential businessman, connected to various characters
  • Relationships:
    • Involved in business dealings with General Yepanchin and others
  • Role: Represents the influence of money and power in shaping relationships and society

item.title: Data Science notes on Algorithmic Models
Data Science notes on Bayesian Stats
Data Science notes on Data Models
Data Science notes on Graph Theory
Data Science notes on Text Analysis
Data Science notes on Time Series Analysis
